name: Vin Sophannary
text:
Sreynich is an exceptionally proactive, talented, and committed learner who consistently demonstrates initiative and a strong willingness to grow. She approaches challenges with a positive attitude, learns quickly, and always delivers high-quality work.

Her ability to learn quickly, solve problems independently, and collaborate effectively with her peers makes her a valuable team member in any professional environment. I have no doubt that she will make meaningful contributions wherever she goes.
